description: Implement the SPANE (Scale of Positive and Negative Experience) psychometric instrument in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!) with automated real-time scoring. Create an active survey titled 'Well-being Study 2025' configured in 'Group by group' format. The instrument requires two array questions: 'SPANEP' (sub-questions: Positive, Good, Pleasant, Happy, Joyful, Contented) and 'SPANEN' (sub-questions: Negative, Bad, Unpleasant, Sad, Afraid, Angry), both using a 1-5 scale. Implement real-time scoring calculations for 'CalcP' (sum of SPANEP items), 'CalcN' (sum of SPANEN items), and 'Balance' (CalcP minus CalcN). The final display must show: 'Your Positive Score is {CalcP}, Negative Score is {CalcN}, and Affect Balance is {Balance}.'
